Uses of Class
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotGradient

    Fields in cc.quaternion.potshaper declared as PotGradient
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final PotGradient
    PotGradient.BLUE
    A predefined linear blue gradient from dark to light blue.
    static final PotGradient
    PotGradient.GRAY
    A predefined linear gray gradient from dark gray to light gray.
    static final PotGradient
    PotGradient.GREEN
    A predefined linear green gradient from dark green to light green.
    static final PotGradient
    PotGradient.ORANGE
    A predefined linear orange gradient from dark orange to yellow.
    static final PotGradient
    PotGradient.PURPLE
    A predefined linear purple gradient from dark purple to magenta.
    Methods in cc.quaternion.potshaper that return PotGradient
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PotGradient
    PotGradient.addStop(double position, PotColor color)
    Adds a color stop with full opacity to this gradient, returning a new gradient.
    PotGradient
    PotGradient.addStop(double position, PotColor color, double opacity)
    Returns a new gradient with the specified stop added at the given position, color, and opacity.
    static PotGradient
    PotGradient.diagonal(PotColor startColor, PotColor endColor)
    Creates a diagonal (45-degree) two-color linear gradient.
    PotGradient
    PotFill.getGradient()
    Returns the gradient definition for this fill.
    static PotGradient
    PotGradient.horizontal(PotColor startColor, PotColor endColor)
    Creates a horizontal left-to-right two-color linear gradient.
    static PotGradient
    PotGradient.linear()
    Creates a new horizontal left-to-right linear gradient.
    static PotGradient
    PotGradient.linear(double angle)
    Creates a new linear gradient with the specified angle.
    static PotGradient
    PotGradient.path()
    Creates a new path gradient.
    static PotGradient
    PotGradient.radial()
    Creates a new radial gradient.
    static PotGradient
    PotGradient.rectangular()
    Creates a new rectangular (diamond) gradient.
    PotGradient
    PotGradient.rotateWithShape(boolean rotateWithShape)
    Returns a new gradient with the specified rotation-with-shape behavior.
    static PotGradient
    PotGradient.simple(double angle, PotColor startColor, PotColor endColor)
    Creates a simple two-color linear gradient with the specified angle and colors.
    static PotGradient
    PotGradient.vertical(PotColor startColor, PotColor endColor)
    Creates a vertical bottom-to-top two-color linear gradient.
    PotGradient
    PotGradient.withAngle(double angle)
    Returns a new gradient with the specified rotation angle.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PotShape
    PotShape.fill(PotGradient gradient)
    Applies a gradient fill to this shape.

    PotFill.gradient(PotGradient gradient)
    Creates a gradient fill.

    PotSlide.setBackground(PotGradient gradient)
    Sets a gradient fill as the background of this slide.
